ham.subject: Your SaaS Subscription Renewal – Action Required
ham.body:
Hi Alex,

We hope you’re enjoying the full features of our SaaS platform. As part of our standard renewal process, your subscription is set to renew on June 30, 2026. Please review the following details:

• Plan: Premium Enterprise
• Billing Cycle: Annual
• Renewal Amount: $1,200.00

You can confirm or modify your renewal preferences by logging into your account at <URL>.

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for choosing our services.

Best regards,

SaaS Support Team
Customer Success

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice – Immediate Payment Required
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks has generated a new invoice for your account that requires immediate attention. Failure to settle this invoice within 48 hours will result in account suspension and potential legal action.

Invoice #: QB-INV-2026-045
Amount Due: $3,750.00
Due Date: 6/1/2026

To verify and secure payment, please click the link below and enter your QuickBooks credentials:
<URL>

Our billing department is on standby to assist you. If you have already processed this payment, please disregard this notice.

Thank you for your prompt cooperation.

Sincerely,

QuickBooks Billing Team
Finance Department
